findings.text: | numerical subdominant spectral pattern | `r3_spectral_probe.csv` shows numerical second absolute eigenvalue and positive gap at three slices for both models | Computational Observation | No exact test until a symbolic eigenvalue/factor candidate is specified | Floating-point eigenvalues do not prove algebraic spectral structure |
